name: phasemill
description: A durable Codex workflow for autonomous planning, implementation, review, project learning, and release.

interface.shortDescription: Run focused or autonomous durable engineering workflows
interface.longDescription: Phasemill guides Codex through repository-grounded design, planning, implementation, native subagent review, independent Pi review, proposal-only project learning, and release using a restart-safe state machine. Its lazy mode can carry an idea through the complete workflow while preserving every explicit safety gate.
defaultPrompt: Take this idea through the complete Phasemill workflow with minimal interaction.
Design and plan this change before implementation.
Execute the accepted plan and review the result.
Learn durable project guidance from this run or an explicitly named PR.
